articles.author: John Power
articles.title: Oil prices surge past $103 a barrel after US announces blockade of Iran - Al Jazeera
articles.description: Asian stocks fall as naval blockade threat injects new turmoil into financial markets.
articles.content:
Oil prices have risen sharply following US President Donald Trumps announcement of a naval blockade of Iran.
Brent crude, the international benchmark, rose more than 8 percent on Sunday to top $103 … [+1899 chars]
